fields.title: task runner: resnapshot + inject worker sandbox per call
fields.description:
## Task

Recompute and apply the effective worker sandbox+approval policy on *every* task invocation (including when reusing an existing `session_id`).

## Files

- `extensions/tau/src/task/index.ts`
- `extensions/tau/src/task/runner.ts`
- `extensions/tau/src/shared/state.ts` (if needed for tau:state helpers)

## Behavior

- At the moment a task is invoked, snapshot the parent's current effective sandbox config.
- Combine with task type requested sandbox overrides (inherit by default).
- Clamp against the parent snapshot (never more permissive).
- Inject/update the worker session's `tau:state` so `sandbox` reads the updated policy.
- For an existing worker `session_id`, ensure the new policy replaces the old one (no privilege retention).

## DoD

- Reusing `session_id` cannot retain older/more-permissive permissions.
- Worker tooling enforces the newly computed policy immediately on that invocation.
fields.close_reason: Implemented worker sandbox/approval inheritance, clamping, per-call resnapshot, approval broker routing, and vitest coverage
